UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis; Clerk: L. Fong; Matter Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances on Wednesday, August 27, 2014:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is represented by Iraidi Angarata.
Attorney John P. Zhanghi of Zanghi Torres Arshawsky LLP (415.357.0600) is also present for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Lisa Ann MacDonald is present with Attorney Cari B. Maas representing the defendant through limited scope;
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Andrew Gaxiola.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants, and/or counsel confer in Room 504A for settlement discussions.
This case does not settle. The trial date of September 2, 2014 remains on calendar.
